_meta.description: Hero image catalog for the Arco recommender. Each entry defines a lifestyle scenario with a Firefly generation prompt, topic keywords for query matching, and a path field that gets populated once the image is generated and uploaded.

firefly_settings.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, text, watermark, logo, cartoon, illustration, drawing, painting, sketch, CGI, 3D render, deformed fingers, extra fingers, fused fingers, missing fingers, bad hands, bad anatomy, distorted proportions, extra limbs, unnatural pose, disfigured

_meta.brand_style: Photorealistic commercial photography. Clean, minimal composition. Natural light preferred, soft shadows. Color palette: deep slate (#1C2B35), warm cream (#F5F0E8), copper accents (#B5651D). No text overlays. Professional food and product photography aesthetic, similar to Kinfolk magazine or Monocle visual style.
